page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Configure Somra server behavior and preferences.

authRequired: Sign in as an administrator to view and change server settings.

defaultLocale.label: System default language
defaultLocale.description: Used when no user preference is set.

scanCron.label: Library scan schedule
scanCron.description: Cron expression for automatic library scans.

maxConcurrentTranscodes.label: Max concurrent transcodes
maxConcurrentTranscodes.description: How many transcode sessions can run at once.

hwAcceleration.title: Hardware acceleration
hwAcceleration.description: Use GPU encoders when available. Software fallback is always enabled.

hwMode.label: Acceleration mode
hwMode.description: Auto uses GPU when detected; Off forces CPU; Force prefers GPU.

hwAccelerator.label: Preferred accelerator
hwAccelerator.description: Auto picks the best detected encoder (Intel QSV priority).

autoDownload.label: Auto-download missing subtitles
autoDownload.description: Automatically fetch subtitles for preferred languages.

apiKey.label: OpenSubtitles API key
apiKey.description: Required for external subtitle search. Get one at opensubtitles.com.

users.description: Create and manage user accounts from the admin panel.
